scripts.dev: npm run build -w @battlecraps/shared && concurrently --names "shared,api,web" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,magenta" "npm run dev -w @battlecraps/shared" "npm run dev -w @battlecraps/api" "npm run dev -w @battlecraps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @battlecraps/shared && npm run build -w @battlecraps/api && npm run build -w @battlecraps/web
